response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile and highly technical Senior/Staff Software Engineer with a strong background in distributed systems and multiple programming languages. However, he lacks the executive leadership background, team-scaling experience, and deep production expertise in both agentic AI and complex fintech infrastructure required for a Chief Technology Officer position at a venture-backed scale-up.
strengths: Extensive hands-on engineering experience spanning over 15 years across diverse technology stacks (TypeScript/Node, DLang, C++).
Proven track record building high-throughput, low-latency microservices, such as handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Recent foundational exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Completely lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience, such as scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers or managing outsourced vendors.
Insufficient production experience architecting complex, stateful multi-agent AI frameworks for high-stakes commercial environments.
Missing deep domain expertise in algorithmic working-capital management and real-time credit risk systems.
